golden_code: int32_t a0 = x_ref; int32_t b0 = y_ref; if (a0 == 0 || b0 == 0) { expected = 0; } else { int32_t a = a0 < 0 ? -a0 : a0; int32_t b = b0 < 0 ? -b0 : b0; int32_t g0 = a; int32_t g1 = b; while (g1 != 0) { int32_t t = static_cast<int32_t>(g0 % g1); g0 = g1; g1 = t; } expected = static_cast<int32_t>((a / g0) * b); }
